name: Salsa Verde
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the garlic in the food processor and pulse until finely chopped (about 10 seconds).
2. Add the scallions, parsley, cilantro, and jalapeno to the food processor and pulse until finely chopped.
3. Add the tomatillos and process until pureed, about 5 seconds.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (hot pepper sauce, salt) and pulse 2 times to mix.
5. Refrigerate, covered.
